requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Armenia Local Fire and Building Authority Approval Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——亚美尼亚当地消防和建筑主管机关审批要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——亞美尼亞當地消防和建築主管機關審批要求

summary.en: Fire safety and building permitting for BESS installations in Armenia falls under the authority of local fire safety inspectorates and building permit authorities operating under Armenian law. Armenia does not have a confirmed standalone national technical regulation specifically for stationary BESS fire safety equivalent to NFPA 855 or a dedicated EU storage installation directive as of the dataset date. SARM (National Body of Standards and Metrology of Armenia) adopts international and GOST-based standards; some IEC fire safety standards relevant to BESS — including IEC 62619, IEC 62933-5-1, and IEC 62133 — may be adopted by SARM or referenced in EAEU Technical Regulations applicable to Armenia. Local fire authority approval is required for commercial and industrial BESS installations before commissioning. Project owners and installers must verify the specific local fire code requirements — including acceptable suppression system types, ventilation requirements, separation distances, thermal-runaway mitigation measures, and emergency shutdown procedures — with the local fire authority having jurisdiction over the installation site. Armenian fire standards may draw from both GOST and IEC frameworks given Armenia's dual EAEU membership and independent IEC engagement through SARM.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚BESS装置的消防安全和建筑许可由依据亚美尼亚法律运营的当地消防安全检查机构和建筑许可主管机关负责。截至本数据集日期，亚美尼亚尚无经确认的专门针对固定式BESS消防安全的独立国家技术法规，相当于NFPA 855或专用欧盟储能安装指令。SARM（亚美尼亚国家标准和计量委员会）采纳国际标准和基于GOST的标准；与BESS相关的部分IEC消防安全标准——包括IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62133——可能已由SARM采纳或在适用于亚美尼亚的EAEU技术法规中被引用。商业和工业BESS装置在投入使用前须取得当地消防主管机关审批。项目业主和安装方须就具体当地消防规范要求——包括可接受的抑制系统类型、通风要求、隔离距离、热失控缓解措施和紧急停机程序——向对安装现场具有管辖权的当地消防主管机关核实。鉴于亚美尼亚同时具备EAEU成员国身份并通过SARM独立参与IEC，亚美尼亚消防标准可能同时借鉴GOST和IEC框架。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞BESS裝置的消防安全和建築許可由依據亞美尼亞法律運營的當地消防安全檢查機構和建築許可主管機關負責。截至本數據集日期，亞美尼亞尚無經確認的專門針對固定式BESS消防安全的獨立國家技術法規，相當於NFPA 855或專用歐盟儲能安裝指令。SARM（亞美尼亞國家標準和計量委員會）採納國際標準和基於GOST的標準；與BESS相關的部分IEC消防安全標準——包括IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62133——可能已由SARM採納或在適用於亞美尼亞的EAEU技術法規中被引用。商業和工業BESS裝置在投入使用前須取得當地消防主管機關審批。項目業主和安裝方須就具體當地消防規範要求——包括可接受的抑制系統類型、通風要求、隔離距離、熱失控緩解措施和緊急停機程序——向對安裝現場具有管轄權的當地消防主管機關核實。鑑於亞美尼亞同時具備EAEU成員國身份並通過SARM獨立參與IEC，亞美尼亞消防標準可能同時借鑑GOST和IEC框架。

standards_or_laws: Local fire safety inspectorate (Armenia) — mandatory approval required for commercial and industrial BESS installations before commissioning; specific applicable code must be verified with the authority having jurisdiction

SARM (National Body of Standards and Metrology of Armenia) — national standards body adopting IEC/GOST standards; verify whether IEC 62619, IEC 62933-5-1, or IEC 62133 have been adopted as Armenian national standards (sarm.am)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard; may be adopted by SARM or referenced in EAEU Technical Regulations)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell/module safety standard; may be referenced in project specifications)
EAEU Technical Regulations TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 — applicable to in-scope BESS equipment; EAC certification required from an EAEU-accredited certification body

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules (mandatory from August 1, 2025). GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 36276-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Armenian fire authorities as equivalent to Armenian or EAEU-based fire-safety requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC-aligned documentation where required by the Armenian local authority having jurisdiction.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定（自2025年8月1日起强制执行）。GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 36276-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被亚美尼亚消防主管机关认可为等同于亚美尼亚或基于EAEU的消防安全要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在亚美尼亚有管辖权的当地主管机关要求时补充符合IEC要求的文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定（自2025年8月1日起強制執行）。GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 36276-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被亞美尼亞消防主管機關認可為等同於亞美尼亞或基於EAEU的消防安全要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在亞美尼亞有管轄權的當地主管機關要求時補充符合IEC要求的文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Local fire authority approval is a mandatory project gate for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Armenia. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not automatically satisfy Armenian local fire authority requirements. The exact applicable fire code framework (IEC, GOST, or EAEU TR-based) varies by project type and must be confirmed with the local authority having jurisdiction. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm with the local Armenian fire authority the applicable fire safety code for the specific installation type, location, and capacity — and whether IEC 62619, IEC 62933-5-1, or IEC 62133 have been adopted as the applicable national standards via SARM; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with the confirmed applicable standard — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) where BESS equipment falls under EAEU TR CU 004/2011 (LVD) or TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), ensure EAC certification from an EAEU-accredited certification body is obtained — Chinese GB certifications are not accepted as equivalent; (d) engage a qualified local fire protection engineer familiar with Armenian regulatory requirements for design review and application submission before project commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：当地消防主管机关审批是亚美尼亚商业和工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不自动满足亚美尼亚当地消防主管机关要求。适用的具体消防规范框架（IEC、GOST或基于EAEU TR）因项目类型和具体情况而异，须与有管辖权的当地主管机关确认。出口商和项目团队应：（a）向当地亚美尼亚消防主管机关确认适用于具体安装类型、地点和容量的消防安全规范——以及IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-1或IEC 62133是否已通过SARM作为适用国家标准采纳；（b）准备符合已确认的适用标准的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序和隔离距离；（c）若BESS设备属于EAEU TR CU 004/2011（低压设备）或TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）范围，须由EAEU认可认证机构颁发EAC证书——中国GB认证不被接受为等效依据；（d）在项目调试前聘请熟悉亚美尼亚法规要求的合格当地消防工程师进行设计审查和申请提交。
gap.zht: 差距：當地消防主管機關審批是亞美尼亞商業和工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不自動滿足亞美尼亞當地消防主管機關要求。適用的具體消防規範框架（IEC、GOST或基於EAEU TR）因項目類型和具體情況而異，須與有管轄權的當地主管機關確認。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）向當地亞美尼亞消防主管機關確認適用於具體安裝類型、地點和容量的消防安全規範——以及IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-1或IEC 62133是否已通過SARM作為適用國家標準採納；（b）準備符合已確認的適用標準的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序和隔離距離；（c）若BESS設備屬於EAEU TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備）或TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）範圍，須由EAEU認可認證機構頒發EAC證書——中國GB認證不被接受為等效依據；（d）在項目調試前聘請熟悉亞美尼亞法規要求的合格當地消防工程師進行設計審查和申請提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — local fire authority approval required for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Armenia before commissioning; specific applicable fire code must be confirmed with the authority having jurisdiction
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: SARM — National Body of Standards and Metrology of Armenia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Local fire authority approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Armenia. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not automatically satisfy Armenian local fire authority or EAEU-based requirements. The applicable fire code framework (IEC, GOST, or EAEU TR-based) must be confirmed with the local authority having jurisdiction. Where BESS equipment is in scope under EAEU TR CU 004/2011 or TR CU 020/2011, EAC certification from an EAEU-accredited body is required — this is a genuine pathway for Armenian market access. Engage the local Armenian fire authority and a qualified local fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code and design requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当地消防主管机关审批是亚美尼亚商业和工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不自动满足亚美尼亚当地消防主管机关或基于EAEU的要求。适用的消防规范框架（IEC、GOST或基于EAEU TR）须与有管辖权的当地主管机关确认。若BESS设备属于EAEU TR CU 004/2011或TR CU 020/2011范围，须由EAEU认可机构颁发EAC证书——这是亚美尼亚市场准入的真实认证路径。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与当地亚美尼亚消防主管机关及合格当地消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范和设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當地消防主管機關審批是亞美尼亞商業和工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不自動滿足亞美尼亞當地消防主管機關或基於EAEU的要求。適用的消防規範框架（IEC、GOST或基於EAEU TR）須與有管轄權的當地主管機關確認。若BESS設備屬於EAEU TR CU 004/2011或TR CU 020/2011範圍，須由EAEU認可機構頒發EAC證書——這是亞美尼亞市場准入的真實認證路徑。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與當地亞美尼亞消防主管機關及合格當地消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範和設計要求。
